name: MIRA
motive: Matter Mapping & Atomic Reconstruction: A system capable of copying the exact sub-nanometer atomic structure of an object and recreating it elsewhere using available feedstock.
priority_reason: Enables high-fidelity matter replicating and programmatic self-assembly.
next_build: Deploy STM/AFM atomic scanning, compile chemical feedstock libraries, and design nanoscale programmatic self-assembly builders.
integration_role: Kattappa AI OS stores object blueprints and issues atomic printer commands.
safety_boundary: Reconstruction must use non-toxic, safe feedstock elements; zero copy-protection circumvention.
